curation_notes: Patch commit bf3dfaa modifies only uefi_firmware/compression/Tiano/Decompress.c. The advisory explicitly names ReadCLen() as the primary vulnerable function where the loop bound Index < Number is not clamped to NC (the array size). ReadPTLen() has the identical pattern with Index < Number not clamped to NPT. Both functions received the same bounds-check fix in the patch. Vulnerability class buffer-overflow confirmed from CWE-787 and the patch which adds array bounds checks to prevent heap out-of-bounds writes.
